ground_truth.title: Federated Learning for Cross-Institutional Financial Fraud Detection with Differential Privacy
ground_truth.abstract: We develop a federated learning framework allowing banks to collaboratively train fraud detection models without sharing customer data, using DP-SGD to provide formal privacy guarantees.
